ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the race took place */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of the race */,
  "circuit_id" TEXT /* ID of the circuit where the race was held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "number_of_laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit */,
  "track_length" REAL /* Length of the track in kilometers */,
  "track_type" TEXT /* Type of the track (e.g., street, permanent) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Spectator capacity of the circuit */,
  "established" INTEGER /* Year the circuit was established */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the circuit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "driver_age" INTEGER /* Age of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "driver_height" REAL /* Height of the driver in meters */,
  "driver_weight" REAL /* Weight of the driver in kilograms */,
  "team_joined_date" TEXT /* Date the driver joined the current team */,
  "driver_status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructors" (
  "constructor_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each constructor */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the constructor */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the constructor was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the constructor's headquarters */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "number_of_championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the constructor */,
  "constructor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the constructor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver */,
  "constructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the constructor */,
  "grid" INTEGER /* Grid position of the driver */,
  "podium" INTEGER /* Whether the driver finished on the podium */,
  "driver_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the driver */,
  "driver_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the driver */,
  "driver_standings_pos" INTEGER /* Driver's standings position */,
  "race_time" TEXT /* Total race time of the driver */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed of the driver during the race */,
  "pit_stops" INTEGER /* Number of pit stops made by the driver */,
  "fastest_lap" INTEGER /* Whether the driver set the fastest lap */,
  "tyre_compound" TEXT /* Tyre compound used by the driver */,
  "fuel_strategy" TEXT /* Fuel strategy used by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES constructors ("constructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constructor_standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings entry */,
  "constructor_id" TEXT /* ID of the constructor */,
  "constructor_points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the constructor */,
  "constructor_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the constructor */,
  "constructor_standings_pos" INTEGER /* Constructor's standings position */,
  "number_of_podiums" INTEGER /* Number of podium finishes by the constructor */,
  "number_of_pole_positions" INTEGER /* Number of pole positions by the constructor */,
  "number_of_fastest_laps" INTEGER /* Number of fastest laps by the constructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constructor_standings_constructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("constructor_id") REFERENCES constructors ("constructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifying_times" (
  "qualifying_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each qualifying entry */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" TEXT /* ID of the driver */,
  "qualifying_time" REAL /* Qualifying time of the driver */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Qualifying position of the driver */,
  "tyre_compound_q" TEXT /* Tyre compound used during qualifying */,
  "weather_conditions_q" TEXT /* Weather conditions during qualifying */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualifying_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_times_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qualifying_times_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
